restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Store up to 460 sheets of letter-size paper with this Staples economy 3-inch round three-ring non-view red binder, which works well for large reports, company manuals and full-size manuscripts. The binder is fully compatible with all of the Staples Brand dividers, making it easier to organize sections and mark important locations. The Staples economy 3-inch round three-ring non-view red binder comes with two interior pockets that are ideal for keeping pages that need a temporary home or easy access.
bullets: Red non-view binders to protect work documents and keep them organized
Three round rings keep pages secure
headliner: Organize paperwork in the Staples economy 3-inch round three-ring non-view red binder, which has interior pockets and a non-locking mechanism for quick and easy access to important documents.

paragraph: This two-pocket folder keeps papers protected and organized for work, school, or personal use. Its reinforced edges help guard against bending or folding. Durable Material - The poly material of this folder resists tears, so you don't need to worry about accidentally ripping it. It's also waterproof to protect your papers from spills or splashes. Handy Pockets- The two interior pockets in this folder easily hold printed documents, invoices, written notes, and clippings. A die-cut business card holder lets you keep your personal information visible inside the folder.
bullets: Convenient twin pockets hold loose documents and other materials
headliner: The poly two-pocket folders in red are made of durable, waterproof, tear-resistant poly material. The pocket folders feature tabs at the top corners to help keep documents in place.

paragraph: Secure unpunched papers with this Staples Better 2-inch three-ring view binder. This binder is made with nonstick archive-safe material that doesn't lift toner from printed pages to keep papers looking clean and professional, while the 2-inch rings let you store up to 540 sheets. This Staples Better 2-inch three-ring view binder is made with a heavy chipboard and premium vinyl, making it reliably sturdy. Durable Exterior - Each 2-inch Staples Better view binder begins with a heavy-duty material that's both rigid and lightweight. This material is then machine sealed inside a layer of nonstick premium vinyl, with special attention given.
bullets: Black better binders to protect work documents and keep them organized
Holds up to 540 sheets for maximized storage
Insert a custom removable spine label for easy identification of the contents
headliner: Keep loose pages secure with this with this Staples Better 2-inch D three-ring black view binder.

dummyKeySTORE.title: Crayola Colored Pencils, Assorted Colors, 12/Box (68-4012)

paragraph: Crayola Colored pencil in assorted colors provide smooth, scratch-free rich coloring. pencil with 3.3 mm core feature wood barrel nontoxic lead for safety usage, sold as 12 per box.
bullets: Ideal for drawing methods requiring precise lines, greater detail and control of color
Pre-sharpened, thick, soft leads for easy blending
Set includes the following colors: yellow, orange, red orange, red, yellow green, green, sky blue, blue, violet, white, brown, and black
12-count box includes: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, violet, brown, black, red/orange, yellow/green, sky blue & light brown
3.3 mm leads for smooth, rich coloring
headliner: Crayola Colored Pencils- Draw Detailed Pictures
expandedDescr:
With Crayola colored pencils, any artist, young or old, can create detailed images in vivid color. The fine tips and easy-flow leads provide smooth lines and rich coloring. With a few simple techniques, such as changing the pencil angle or altering drawing pressure, it's easy to create a variety of different textures and details for artwork that is uniquely yours.

Rich, Vibrant Colors
The 12-count box of Crayola colored pencils provides all the basic colors you need to create whatever images you can imagine. You can easily blend colors to create more variety, or you can upgrade to the 24-count box to choose from even more rich colors.

Presharpened for Immediate Use
The pencils come presharpened, so they are ready to use right out of the box. When they wear down, the smooth lead tips sharpen easily.

Convenient Packaging
Each set of Crayola colored pencils comes in a sturdy box that is perfect for storing the pencils. It keeps them safe and ready for use, so you don't have to worry about lost or broken pencils.

dummyKeySTORE.title: Scotch Magic Invisible Clear Tape With Dispenser, 0.75" x 18 yds., 1" Core, Transparent, 6 Rolls/Pack (6122)

paragraph: Scotch Magic Tape lets you magically mend the many rips and tears on school assignments - securely, permanently and invisibly. The original matte-finish invisible tape uses unique 3M adhesive technology to bond tightly with paper and disappear without a trace. It's the ideal matte tape for permanent, secure paper mending, whether you need to make a quick fix or an addition to your school projects. This clear tape is also perfect for fixing torn or ripped originals, like ripped college notebooks, essays, drawings, arts and crafts projects, library book pages and other paper projects. Easy to apply, this tape is photo-safe for worry-free mounting or mending of special photos for your dorm room or classroom. You can even write on this adhesive tape with a pen, pencil or marker, making it easy to label items. With the easy-to-use Scotch tape dispenser (included), Scotch Magic Tape rolls out smoothly and cuts easily with no time, energy or tape wasted. These dispensers are a convenient addition to teacher supplies and classroom supplies. Refill and reuse the included hand-held office tape dispenser with Scotch Brand Tape. The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape (based on 2022 NPD data).
bullets: INVISIBLE TAPE: 6 rolls of Scotch Magic Tape with dispenser mends rips and tears in college essentials, like notebooks, securely, permanently and invisibly
BONDS SECURELY: Clear tape that gives you a strong, secure and permanent seal using trusted 3M adhesive technology
BLENDS IN: Matte finish and invisible, this tape blends in with paper, making it a great addition to your back to school supplies

IDEAL FOR: Use this office tape for permanent, secure paper mending, including mounting, quick fixes, project additions and repairing items like textbooks, library pages, arts and crafts projects or study materials
REFILLABLE TAPE DISPENSERS INCLUDED: Tape glides off easy-to-use Scotch tape dispensers (included) smoothly and cuts easily
ADDITIONAL BENEFITS: This photo-safe tape is easy to apply; Plus, you can write on it with a pen, pencil or marker for easy labeling
PACKAGE CONTENTS: One package with six dispensers containing six tape rolls that are 0.75 in. x 650 in., with a 1-in. core
SCOTCH BRAND: The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape

paragraph: Protect company property and personal belongings with this combination dial padlock. A durable locking mechanism with anti-shim technology blocks access without a three-digit combination, while the hardened steel shackle resists cutting and protects belongings from thieves with bolt cutters. This Master Lock combination dial padlock comes in assorted bright colors that make it easy to identify lockers or cabinets at a glance.
bullets: Combination dial padlock for cabinets, storage lockers, and school, employee and athletic lockers

headliner: Make storage lockers and cabinets more secure with this Master Lock combination dial padlock.

paragraph: Crayola Colored pencil in assorted colors provide smooth, scratch-free rich coloring. pencil with 3.3 mm core feature wood barrel nontoxic lead for safety usage, sold as 12 per box.
bullets: Ideal for drawing methods requiring precise lines, greater detail and control of color
Pre-sharpened, thick, soft leads for easy blending
Set includes the following colors: yellow, orange, red orange, red, yellow green, green, sky blue, blue, violet, white, brown, and black
12-count box includes: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, violet, brown, black, red/orange, yellow/green, sky blue & light brown
3.3 mm leads for smooth, rich coloring
headliner: Crayola Colored Pencils- Draw Detailed Pictures
expandedDescr:
With Crayola colored pencils, any artist, young or old, can create detailed images in vivid color. The fine tips and easy-flow leads provide smooth lines and rich coloring. With a few simple techniques, such as changing the pencil angle or altering drawing pressure, it's easy to create a variety of different textures and details for artwork that is uniquely yours.

Rich, Vibrant Colors
The 12-count box of Crayola colored pencils provides all the basic colors you need to create whatever images you can imagine. You can easily blend colors to create more variety, or you can upgrade to the 24-count box to choose from even more rich colors.

Presharpened for Immediate Use
The pencils come presharpened, so they are ready to use right out of the box. When they wear down, the smooth lead tips sharpen easily.

Convenient Packaging
Each set of Crayola colored pencils comes in a sturdy box that is perfect for storing the pencils. It keeps them safe and ready for use, so you don't have to worry about lost or broken pencils.

bullets: INVISIBLE TAPE: 6 rolls of Scotch Magic Tape with dispenser mends rips and tears in college essentials, like notebooks, securely, permanently and invisibly
BONDS SECURELY: Clear tape that gives you a strong, secure and permanent seal using trusted 3M adhesive technology
BLENDS IN: Matte finish and invisible, this tape blends in with paper, making it a great addition to your back to school supplies

IDEAL FOR: Use this office tape for permanent, secure paper mending, including mounting, quick fixes, project additions and repairing items like textbooks, library pages, arts and crafts projects or study materials
REFILLABLE TAPE DISPENSERS INCLUDED: Tape glides off easy-to-use Scotch tape dispensers (included) smoothly and cuts easily
ADDITIONAL BENEFITS: This photo-safe tape is easy to apply; Plus, you can write on it with a pen, pencil or marker for easy labeling
PACKAGE CONTENTS: One package with six dispensers containing six tape rolls that are 0.75 in. x 650 in., with a 1-in. core
SCOTCH BRAND: The best projects start with the No. 1-selling home and office tape

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Protect company property and personal belongings with this combination dial padlock. A durable locking mechanism with anti-shim technology blocks access without a three-digit combination, while the hardened steel shackle resists cutting and protects belongings from thieves with bolt cutters. This Master Lock combination dial padlock comes in assorted bright colors that make it easy to identify lockers or cabinets at a glance.
bullets: Combination dial padlock for cabinets, storage lockers, and school, employee and athletic lockers
Padlock dimensions: 1.88"W body, 1"H x 0.75"W shackle clearance
Features a wide durable metal body with an anodized aluminum finish
Shackle with 0.28"Dia. is made of hardened steel and offers extra resistance to cutting and sawing
Locking mechanism features anti-shim technology, offering maximum security
headliner: Make storage lockers and cabinets more secure with this Master Lock combination dial padlock.
